attributes.description: Cost breakdown by SKU, deployment, and tier. Shows total billing, cost by component, and deployment cost comparison.
attributes.title: [Chargeback] Billing Components Overview

embeddableConfig.esql_query:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE deployment_group != ""
| STATS COUNT(*) BY deployment_group
| KEEP deployment_group
| SORT deployment_group
embeddableConfig.title: Deployment group

embeddableConfig.esql_query:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE deployment_group != ""
| STATS COUNT(*) BY deployment_name
| KEEP deployment_name
| SORT deployment_name
embeddableConfig.title: Deployment name

embeddableConfig.esql_query:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_category IS NOT NULL
| STATS COUNT(*) BY cost_category
| KEEP cost_category
| SORT cost_category
embeddableConfig.title: Cost category

embeddableConfig.esql_query:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
| STATS COUNT(*) BY cost_type
| KEEP cost_type
| SORT cost_type
embeddableConfig.title: Cost type

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (CASE(?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group)))
| WHERE (CASE(?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name)))
| WHERE (CASE(?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category)))
| WHERE (CASE(?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type)))
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0),
    deployment = CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")")
| STATS `Normalized cost` = SUM(total_chargeable_units_value) BY @timestamp, deployment
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
| WHERE (CASE(?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group)))
| WHERE (CASE(?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name)))
| WHERE (CASE(?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category)))
| WHERE (CASE(?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type)))
| LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup ON @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND @timestamp <= conf_end_date
| EVAL total_chargeable_units_value = COALESCE(total_chargeable_units, total_ecu) * COALESCE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0),
    deployment = CONCAT(deployment_name, " (", LEFT(deployment_id, 6), ")")
| STATS `Normalized cost` = SUM(total_chargeable_units_value) BY @timestamp, deployment
| SORT @timestamp DESC
| LIMIT 5000

embeddableConfig.description: Full deployment bill: the sum of ALL billing SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, data transfer and on-prem nodes) converted at the configured rate. This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.
embeddableConfig.title: Total Cloud Billing Over Time

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | WHERE
      CASE(?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON
          @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND
            @timestamp <= conf_end_date
  | EVAL
      _units = CASE(
                 total_chargeable_units IS NOT NULL,
                 total_chargeable_units,
                 total_ecu),
      _rate  = CASE(
                 conf_chargeable_unit_rate IS NOT NULL,
                 conf_chargeable_unit_rate,
                 CASE(
                   conf_ecu_rate IS NOT NULL,
                   conf_ecu_rate,
                   1.0)),
      total_chargeable_units_value = _units * _rate
  | STATS
      `Normalized cost` =
        SUM(total_chargeable_units_value)
        BY @timestamp, deployment_group
  | SORT @timestamp DESC
  | LIMIT 5000

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | WHERE
      CASE(?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON
          @timestamp >= conf_start_date AND
            @timestamp <= conf_end_date
  | EVAL
      _units = CASE(
                 total_chargeable_units IS NOT NULL,
                 total_chargeable_units,
                 total_ecu),
      _rate  = CASE(
                 conf_chargeable_unit_rate IS NOT NULL,
                 conf_chargeable_unit_rate,
                 CASE(
                   conf_ecu_rate IS NOT NULL,
                   conf_ecu_rate,
                   1.0)),
      total_chargeable_units_value = _units * _rate
  | STATS
      `Normalized cost` =
        SUM(total_chargeable_units_value)
        BY @timestamp, deployment_group
  | SORT @timestamp DESC
  | LIMIT 5000

embeddableConfig.description: Full deployment bill: the sum of ALL billing SKUs (data tiers, ML, Kibana, snapshots, data transfer and on-prem nodes) converted at the configured rate. This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.
embeddableConfig.title: Normalized cost trend by deployment group

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | WHERE
      CASE(?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
  | EVAL `ts` = @timestamp
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON `ts` >= conf_start_date AND `ts` <= conf_end_date
  | EVAL
      _units = CASE(
                 total_chargeable_units IS NOT NULL,
                 total_chargeable_units,
                 total_ecu),
      _rate  = CASE(
                 conf_chargeable_unit_rate IS NOT NULL,
                 conf_chargeable_unit_rate,
                 CASE(
                   conf_ecu_rate IS NOT NULL,
                   conf_ecu_rate,
                   1.0))
  | STATS
      `Normalized cost` = SUM(_units * _rate)
        BY deployment_group
  | RENAME deployment_group AS `Deployment Group`
  | SORT `Normalized cost` DESC

  | WHERE

  | EVAL `ts` = @timestamp

  | EVAL
      _units = CASE(

      _rate  = CASE(

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
  | WHERE
      CASE(?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
  | EVAL
      `ts` = @timestamp,
      `Cost Category` = cost_category,
      `Cost Type` = cost_type,
      Deployment = deployment_name
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON `ts` >= conf_start_date AND `ts` <= conf_end_date
  | EVAL
      _units = CASE(total_chargeable_units IS NOT NULL, total_chargeable_units, total_ecu),
      _rate  = CASE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate IS NOT NULL, conf_chargeable_unit_rate,
                 CASE(conf_ecu_rate IS NOT NULL, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0))
  | STATS
      `Normalized cost` = SUM(_units * _rate)
        BY Deployment, `Cost Category`, `Cost Type`
  | SORT `Normalized cost` DESC

FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
  | WHERE
      CASE(?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?deployment_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?deployment_selected, deployment_name))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_category_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_category_selected, cost_category))
  | WHERE
      CASE(?cost_type_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?cost_type_selected, cost_type))
  | EVAL
      `ts` = @timestamp,
      `Cost Category` = cost_category,
      `Cost Type` = cost_type,
      Deployment = deployment_name
  | LOOKUP JOIN chargeback_conf_lookup
        ON `ts` >= conf_start_date AND `ts` <= conf_end_date
  | EVAL
      _units = CASE(total_chargeable_units IS NOT NULL, total_chargeable_units, total_ecu),
      _rate  = CASE(conf_chargeable_unit_rate IS NOT NULL, conf_chargeable_unit_rate,
                 CASE(conf_ecu_rate IS NOT NULL, conf_ecu_rate, 1.0))
  | STATS
      `Normalized cost` = SUM(_units * _rate)
        BY Deployment, `Cost Category`, `Cost Type`
  | SORT `Normalized cost` DESC

embeddableConfig.description:
Cost broken down by Deployment, and FinOps roll-up group (Cost category).
Cost category groups these into broader buckets (data_tier, platform, transfer, snapshot, onprem, other).
This is the highest-level total. Tier and data-stream panels show only the allocatable data-tier pool, so they sum to less than this figure.
embeddableConfig.title: Normalized cost share by cost category

query.esql:
FROM billing_cluster_cost_lookup
  | WHERE cost_type IS NOT NULL
  | WHERE
      CASE(?dg_selected IS NULL OR MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, ["All"]), true, MV_INTERSECTS(?dg_selected, deployment_group))

  | EVAL
      _units =
        CASE(
          total_chargeable_units IS NOT NULL,
          total_chargeable_units,

      _rate =

embeddableConfig.description:
Cost broken down by Deployment, and Billable component (Cost type).
Cost Type shows individual SKU families (datahot/datacontent, datawarm, ml, kibana, snapshots, …).
embeddableConfig.title: Normalized cost share by cost type
